metadata.name: Consider — surveil 1 to graveyard then draw a card
metadata.description: p1 casts Consider ({U} Instant: Surveil 1, draw a card). On resolution, p1 looks at the top card of their library (Lightning Bolt), chooses to put it into the graveyard per CR 701.25a, then draws the next card (Plains). Tests the full Surveil 1 effect: the surveiled card ends up in the graveyard, the library top changes, and the player's hand size is net-zero relative to the start (spent Consider, drew Plains).
metadata.generation_notes: Consider oracle text: 'Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Draw a card.' Cost {U}. CR 701.25a: Surveil N = look at top N cards, put any number into graveyard, rest on top in any order. For Surveil 1, p1 puts the top card (Lightning Bolt) into their graveyard. Then draws a card per the second clause. Initial library: [Lightning Bolt (top), Plains]. After surveil: Lightning Bolt goes to graveyard, library = [Plains]. After draw: Plains moves to hand, library = []. Hand count math: start 1 (Consider), cast (-1 = 0), surveil 0 hand change, draw +1 = 1. Net hand same as start. CR 701.25d: the Surveilled event fires even with a non-empty library of the surveiled card count. Consider itself goes to p1's graveyard as a resolved instant (CR 608.2). Final graveyard has both Consider and Lightning Bolt. p1 draws Plains from the library.

script.step_note: p1 casts Consider, surveils Lightning Bolt to graveyard, then draws Plains.

actions.description: Initial: Consider in p1 hand, 2 cards in library, graveyard empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Consider; {U} paid from pool. No targets required.

actions.description: After casting: Consider on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Consider moved from hand to stack on cast.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Consider resolves.

resolution.choice: p1 puts Lightning Bolt (top of library) into graveyard
resolution.note: CR 701.25a: Surveil 1 — p1 looks at top card (Lightning Bolt) and chooses to put it into their graveyard. Library: [Plains].
CR 120.2: p1 draws 1 card (Plains from top of library). Hand: 1 card.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Consider resolves. Surveil 1 sends Lightning Bolt to graveyard; then p1 draws Plains. Consider itself goes to p1's graveyard.

actions.description: Final: p1 hand has 1 card (Plains drawn), Lightning Bolt in graveyard, Consider in graveyard, library empty, stack empty
actions.note: Surveil put Lightning Bolt into graveyard (CR 701.25a). p1 then drew Plains (hand = 1). Net hand count: start 1, cast -1, draw +1 = 1. Library is now empty. Consider in graveyard as resolved instant (CR 608.2).
